ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of mass spectrometry instrument used (e.g., Orbitrap, QTOF) */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mass spectrometry instrument used */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., DIA, DDA) */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of biological sample used */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental protocol followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "raw_data" (
  "raw_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each raw data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the data belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the raw data file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the raw data file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the raw data was uploaded */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the raw data file (e.g., mzML, RAW) */,
  "sample_prep_method" TEXT /* Method used for sample preparation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("raw_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raw_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processed_data" (
  "processed_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processed data file */,
  "raw_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the raw data the processed data is derived from */,
  "processing_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for processing the data (e.g., MaxQuant, Proteome Discoverer) */,
  "processing_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for processing the data */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was processed */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the processing software used */,
  "quality_metrics" TEXT /* Metrics indicating the quality of processed data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processed_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processed_data_raw_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("raw_data_id") REFERENCES raw_data ("raw_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peptides" (
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peptide */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the peptide */,
  "modification" TEXT /* Post-translational modifications of the peptide */,
  "charge" INTEGER /* Charge of the peptide */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the peptide */,
  "retention_time" REAL /* Retention time of the peptide in the chromatogram */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "accession" TEXT /* Accession number of the protein */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protein */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene encoding the protein */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism from which the protein originates */,
  "protein_family" TEXT /* Family or class of the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quantification" (
  "quantification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quantification result */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide being quantified */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the peptide belongs to */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the peptide */,
  "ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the peptide intensity to a reference intensity */,
  "quantification_method" TEXT /* Method used for quantification (e.g., label-free, TMT) */,
  "reference_sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reference sample used for ratio calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quantification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quantification_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quantification_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliation of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
